name: Tabitha Isner
subject: Missing Martha - A Comedy in Three Parts
body:
| | | It started with a silly little video. Tabitha was asked to do a Martha Roby impression and she did.... by disappearing. Watch the hilarious video [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1997956/10418145/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzE4YmRmNi02NWE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6853YaJ_QIoHPV4RTTXMAgFgTn2LkCNlWVhSKzfFa0=&v=uXXs9BJOj5o). Then a local reporter showed Martha the video and _filmed her reaction. _More hilarity. Watch that video [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1997957/10418146/-1313803845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzE4YmRmNi02NWE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6853YaJ_QIoHPV4RTTXMAgFgTn2LkCNlWVhSKzfFa0=). Then Team Tabitha responded with another video, calling Martha out more explicitly about her failure to have a Town Hall (or any truly public event) for five whole years. Watch it [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1997958/10418147/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzE4YmRmNi02NWE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6853YaJ_QIoHPV4RTTXMAgFgTn2LkCNlWVhSKzfFa0=&v=vAwUbkqhJNE). ** ** |

name: Melania Trump
subject: I never envisioned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible |
---
| | | | | | |
Friend,

>From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible and took the oath of office to serve as America's President, he has worked nonstop to deliver on his promises.

Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they possibly can to discredit Donald with false accusations by spreading their fake news and making it appear that he does not have the support of America's voters.

**[That is why I am asking that you join my husband as he fights for our nation by signing your Presidential Pledge of Support.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d4b71cebf520c5b240db9ca303f40365a61989289ac96f473f717643bdc8a8b84fd862caae8cebba2400b9aaa8d0d2667d680fd3559170b4)**

Up until a few years ago, I never envisioned that I would one day serve our nation as First Lady.

Everything you and I believe in regarding the future of America is on the line in the coming months. _This is a battle we must win together._

I'm asking you and other Americans across the country to personally register your support and help prove that the Democrats and media are wrong.

**[Please sign your Presidential Pledge of Support. I look forward to telling Donald that you are standing with him.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8dce795574fcbc6be939a97bf4e1246e9d388681cbe7c826b7bd991625306f0984732ec149e1eeb13541ab7ec2fafebffb911260aa0aa888)**

Sincerely,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8dce795574fcbc6b00b21b8af299179489cad38d4a6c787f45287230c678c7b9cbded1df6bffb28630cd168a6bfcb50555956d225869b524)
Melania Trump

[SIGN YOUR PLEDGE](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8dce795574fcbc6b44878ffed5500c9189eacb5b7f16e85e6d65c10a71437ddf064d17d7f4824eb880a69cd4f92595dc62eeba890939eb5c)

body:
| |
---
# _REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_
##
[**Mainstream Media vs. Main Street USA**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/steve-cortes-mainstream-media-vs-main-street-usa/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) _-RealClearPolitics_ Steve Cortes tells a tale of two Americas: “the concerns of Mainstream Media vs. those of Main Street USA.” Those worlds couldn’t be more different. “Far from New York newsrooms and the Georgetown salons of Washington lobbyists, Americans grasp the reality of a stronger and more prosperous country,” Cortes explains.
##
[**US Stock Market Sets Record-Long Bull Run**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/fox-business-us-stock-market-sets-record-long-bull-run/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) -Fox Business Leia Klingel reports that U.S. stocks have set a record for the longest bull market in history. “Many believe it has plenty of room to run. Consumer spending makes up about two-thirds of U.S. economic growth, and economic data shows that consumers are confident in their finances.”
##
[**ICE Deports Former Nazi Labor Camp Guard Who Lied About His Past**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/ice-deports-former-nazi-labor-camp-guard-who-lied-about-his-past) _-Washington Examine_ r “U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement early Tuesday deported a former Nazi SS labor camp guard to Germany, pursuant to a 2004 deportation order,” Pete Kasperowicz reports. “Jakiw Palij, 95, had lived in Queens, N.Y., for decades, according to White House press secretary Sarah Sanders. She said President Trump prioritized Palij's deportation after ‘extensive negotiations’ with Germany.” [**I Was an Astronaut. We Need a Space Force.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/i-was-an-astronaut-we-need-a-space-force/2018/08/23/637667e6-a6fb-11e8-b76b-d513a40042f6_story.html?utm_term=.c6d71561efc2) _-The Washington Post_ Retired U.S. Air Force Colonel Terry Virts, who served as commander of the International Space Station, explains the importance of President Trump’s vision for a sixth branch of our military. “There has been a fair amount of criticism stemming from a lack of understanding about what such a force would be,” Virts says. [**President Trump Awards Medal of Honor to Fallen Airman John Chapman**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/2018/08/22/trump-awards-john-chapman-congressional-medal-honor/1060626002/) _-USA Today_ “President Donald Trump on Wednesday awarded the Medal of Honor to the widow of John Chapman, a U.S. Air Force technical sergeant, who died at 36 in Afghanistan,” Caroline Simon reports. “In this final act of supreme courage, John gave his life for his fellow warriors,” President Trump said at a ceremony in the White House. [**A Better Way to Ensure Clean, Reliable Energy**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/better-way-ensure-clean-reliable-energy/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) _-Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ Acting EPA Administrator Andrew Wheeler breaks down how under the Trump Administration’s new Affordable Clean Energy (ACE) rule, “the era of top-down, one-size-fits-all federal mandates is over.” Unlike the Obama-era Clean Power Plan—which was formally disapproved in a bipartisan act of Congress—the ACE rule appreciates that “reliable and affordable energy is the foundation of America’s strength.” [**Trump: ‘Open-Border Extremists’ Oppose ICE, Border Patrol**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/08/20/trump-open-border-extremists-oppose-ice-border-patrol/) _-The Daily Signal_ “President Donald Trump praised the actions of federal immigration agents Monday and denounced ‘open-borders extremists,’” Fred Lucas reports. “Any politician who puts criminal aliens before American citizens should find a new line of work,” the President said at a ceremony honoring immigration law enforcement officers. [**Media’s Biggest Kavanaugh Misses: Aspiring Hit Pieces on Supreme Court Pick Draw Mockery**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&http://www.foxnews.com/politics/2018/08/20/medias-biggest-kavanaugh-misses-aspiring-hit-pieces-on-supreme-court-pick-draw-mockery.html) -Fox News The most recent attempt by the left to discredit Judge Brett Kavanaugh? “A detailed New Yorker analysis of his college sports reporting three decades ago,” Brian Flood writes, “which quotes one academic, somehow, asserting that Kavanaugh’s college basketball articles show he would endorse ‘unlimited Presidential power.’”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI1Ljk0MDc5NjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNS45NDA3OTY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc3MDAyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&110&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

She said President Trump prioritized Palij's deportation after ‘extensive negotiations’ with Germany.” -The Washington Post Retired U.S. Air Force Colonel Terry Virts, who served as commander of the International Space Station, explains the importance of President Trump’s vision for a sixth branch of our military. “There has been a fair amount of criticism stemming from a lack of understanding about what such a force would be,” Virts says. -USA Today “President Donald Trump on Wednesday awarded the Medal of Honor to the widow of John Chapman, a U.S. Air Force technical sergeant, who died at 36 in Afghanistan,” Caroline Simon reports. “In this final act of supreme courage, John gave his life for his fellow warriors,” President Trump said at a ceremony in the White House. -Pittsburgh Post-Gazette Acting EPA Administrator Andrew Wheeler breaks down how under the Trump Administration’s new Affordable Clean Energy (ACE) rule, “the era of top-down, one-size-fits-all federal mandates is over.” Unlike the Obama-era Clean Power Plan—which was formally disapproved in a bipartisan act of Congress—the ACE rule appreciates that “reliable and affordable energy is the foundation of America’s strength.” -The Daily Signal_ “President Donald Trump praised the actions of federal immigration agents Monday and denounced ‘open-borders extremists,’” Fred Lucas reports. “Any politician who puts criminal aliens before American citizens should find a new line of work,” the President said at a ceremony honoring immigration law enforcement officers. -Fox News The most recent attempt by the left to discredit Judge Brett Kavanaugh? “A detailed New Yorker analysis of his college sports reporting three decades ago,” Brian Flood writes, “which quotes one academic, somehow, asserting that Kavanaugh’s college basketball articles show he would endorse ‘unlimited Presidential power.’” | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

Peter, For most of the last year, the media have paid little attention to the Texas 10th. But things are changing!
* Last Friday, The Hill published "**[Worst-case scenario for House GOP is 70-seat wipeout](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2001244/10433948/684471394?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWIxOTE3OS04NGE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3NJLaxxhDHttQNaTd8aHJNvwLOwBBpVbFrD0MTZ5jKc=),**" stating that TX-10 incumbent Michael McCaul "would be at risk" if the November election plays out like recent special elections;

* On Wednesday, the Austin-American Statesman highlighted Mike in their story on how Texas Republicans are hiding from the crimes of Cohen and Manfort. They quoted Mike: ["**When I knock on doors across this district, I hear two consistent themes from voters of every persuasion: let’s restore common decency to our government, and let’s have a real system of checks and balances** ";](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2001245/10433949/-797656043?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWIxOTE3OS04NGE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3NJLaxxhDHttQNaTd8aHJNvwLOwBBpVbFrD0MTZ5jKc=)

* Also on Wednesday, a Statesman op-ed criticized McCaul for refusing to hold public meetings, and described Mike Siegel as one of several "**[young, inspired Democrats working to begin turning Texas blue in November](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2001246/10433950/193975174?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWIxOTE3OS04NGE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3NJLaxxhDHttQNaTd8aHJNvwLOwBBpVbFrD0MTZ5jKc=)** ";

* Then, on Friday, the Statesman ran a full piece on our recent poll results, noting that "[**Siegel’s candidacy is a measure of Democratic enthusiasm that has spilled into congressional districts held by entrenched Republican incumbents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2001247/10433951/894821462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWIxOTE3OS04NGE4LWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3NJLaxxhDHttQNaTd8aHJNvwLOwBBpVbFrD0MTZ5jKc=)"

Please share these pieces with your friends and neighbors, to let them know our momentum continues! And we'll keep working to earn the next round of coverage. \-- Lizza, Courtney, Santiago, and the rest of the S4TX communications team

name: Surveys@TimKaine.com
subject: [NEW EDUCATION SURVEY] Need messaging help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115e/3e0906/6c35400f/3e36b537/3993205746/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey&source=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, our opponent has been on the attack recently.

His latest (untrue) talking point? _Tim Kaine hasn 't gotten anything done as Virginia's Senator._

We know this isn't true. Just recently, Tim accomplished one of his largest goals in the Senate: **Three bills he wrote to advance career and technical education were signed into law.**

Education matters a lot to Tim. Our campaign's very first ad focuses on his work to improve career and technical education programs here in Virginia.

But we're worried this message isn't getting through to some voters. That's why we need your help. [Take our brief education survey to help us craft a positive message and fight back against Corey's attacks >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115e/3e0906/6c35400f/3e36b536/3993205746/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/education-survey-august?source=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Take+our+brief+education+survey+to+help+&utm_campaign=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey") [**Do you think Tim Kaine 's work in the Senate to advance educational opportunities for all students is important?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115e/3e0906/6c35400f/3e36b535/3993205746/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/education-survey-august?source=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Do+you+think+Tim+Kainersquos+work+in+the&utm_campaign=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey") Yes
No
| [**Submit**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115e/3e0906/6c35400f/3e36b534/3993205746/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/education-survey-august?source=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Submit&utm_campaign=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey")
---
Not only is Corey Stewart completely wrong about Tim's record - during his time as Prince William County Supervisor, Corey repeatedly underfunded schools by _millions of dollars_. We need a leader in the Senate who will support our kids, not slash funding for their education.

**By taking our quick survey and telling us how education matters to _you_ , you'll give us vital information about exactly how to re-elect Tim - and take back the House - in November.**
[**Take our brief education survey**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115e/3e0906/6c35400f/3e36b50b/3993205746/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/education-survey-august?source=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Take+our+brief+education+survey&utm_campaign=20180825_1_SURV_TEAM_Ed-Survey")

Thanks for your help,

_TK 2018 Survey Team_

Peter,
Quinnipiac University’s new poll confirms what we already knew — our campaign continues to gain momentum, while corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez continues to struggle.

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Will you let me explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- Because of a big fundraising deadline coming up on Friday, my team will be sending you a few emails in the next several days asking you to contribute to my campaign. **This isn’t the part of campaigning I particularly enjoy, but I wanted to take a moment to explain why these requests matter.** Congress is broken. Instead of working together to find real solutions facing our communities, Washington is dominated by bickering and partisanship. I believe that by bringing people together, we can bring common sense back to Washington and start getting things done again. And from the outpouring of support we’ve seen on the campaign trail, I know our message is resonating with Tennesseans. **But the politicians and special interests in Washington aren’t happy about our momentum.** They’re already directing their mega donors and dark money groups to flood this race with millions of dollars to air ads that will drag us into the rancor and chaos dominating so much of our country’s politics. Our campaign needs to have the resources required to cut through the noise. **Can I count on you to pitch in a $10 donation? name: Jake Fons
subject: two polls in the single digits could mean trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Read before you head out to enjoy the weekend.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ae1f/c1f7015/6a1a5217/1141dcd4/3277112648/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180825&recurring=auto") Friends, Republicans are increasingly confident they can flip this Senate seat red in November. **In fact, just this week,_Real Clear Politics_ ran a giant headline saying, "Minnesota Senate Race Could Bolster GOP Firewall."** And we can see why: Two new polls show this Senate race within single digits. And now we just got word that Mike Pence is coming next week to host a big money fundraiser for our GOP opponent. Republicans will spend every special interest dollar they can to turn this seat red and defeat Tina. We just can't let that happen -- not with the future of health care, the Supreme Court, and our environment on the line. **Will you make a contribution of $10 or more so we can fend off Pence and the Republican special interests spending big to flip this Senate seat red? We need our grassroots donors to step up to counter the millions that will be spent against us:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ae1f/c1f7015/6a1a5217/1141dcd5/3277112648/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180825-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

As we get ready to close the books on August, it's more important than ever that we hit every goal and go into September strong.

**There is not much time left for you to make a difference in the upcoming election:**

* The Democrats and their progressive allies are focused on winning control of Congress – they are raising millions from their supporters to defeat our majority and end our Making America Great Again Agenda.

* Democratic Senate candidates are raising money at a torrid fundraising pace. If this continues, and we do not step up, our candidates could be drowned in negative and misleading ads. We must raise money to respond before it is too late.

* The mainstream media is not on our side. They are promoting misleading narratives.

**These three things could cause us to lose in November. This would be a total disaster. This would put an end to our agenda.**

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor. There is less than a week to go before our August deadline, and we are behind where we need to be. This is so important that we will 4x match all contributions you make to help us defend President Trump’s majority. Fellow Conservative, This is really urgent. Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, Cory Gardner, Mitch McConnell, and many others have been sending you messages. This is because we need your support before it is too late. There is less than a week to go before our August deadline, and we are behind where we need to be. There is not much time left for you to make a difference in the upcoming election: The Democrats and their progressive allies are focused on winning control of Congress – they are raising millions from their supporters to defeat our majority and end our Making America Great Again Agenda. Democratic Senate candidates are raising money at a torrid fundraising pace. If this continues, and we do not step up, our candidates could be drowned in negative and misleading ads. We must raise money to respond before it is too late. The mainstream media is not on our side. They are promoting misleading narratives. These three things could cause us to lose in November. This would be a total disaster. This would put an end to our agenda. We can stop this from happening, but we need your support now. Everything we have worked for is on the line. Will you step up to make a difference? Thank you! Friend,

Last week, the courts called out Republican legislative leaders for trying to mislead voters in their amendments to our Constitution.

Now, GOP leaders have called themselves back to Raleigh for a special session.

The goal of this session seems pretty clear: another attempt at rigging the system and undermining our constitution. When things go bad for them in the courts, they try an end run to avoid the ruling.

**North Carolinians want our legislators to focus on improving education and bringing new jobs to our communities -- not these continued attacks on our Constitution.**

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Maggie Hassan said I could email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- Because of you, Maggie Hassan is in Washington fighting for us. I don't have to tell you that elections have consequences. If not for Maggie's critical vote in the Senate to protect the Affordable Care Act, Donald Trump and this reckless administration would have ripped healthcare away from millions of Americans.
Well, I happen to know a few things about fighting, too.
I ran for the Executive Council in New Hampshire because a group of Republican men defunded Planned Parenthood, jeopardizing the critical health services 13,000 Granite Staters depend on. I stood with Maggie as an Executive Councilor to restore Planned Parenthood funding and ensure that we expanded Medicaid to more than 50,000 Granite Staters.
I'm running for Congress because I want to serve my home state and take on the big fights we have ahead of us, but I need your help.
[**I hope you will consider making a contribution of $3 or more now so we can win this race and help flip the House to the Democrats.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00a/2a380d31/32e20640/f1b0e9/720286733/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNHBhcHBhcyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTgwODI1X01XSDRQYXBwYXNfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4pappas?refcode=e20180825_MWH4Pappas_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
I would be honored to serve alongside Maggie in Congress, but I can't get there without the support of folks like you who helped push her over the finish line in 2016.
[**Please contribute $3 or as much as you can now to help our campaign as we close in on Primary Day on September 11th.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00a/2a380d31/32e20640/f1b0e9/720286733/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNHBhcHBhcyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTgwODI1X01XSDRQYXBwYXNfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4pappas?refcode=e20180825_MWH4Pappas_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
There's so much at stake this year. This swing district will determine whether we will have the checks and balance we desperately need in Washington. We're working hard for victory, and I hope you can stand with us today.
Chris
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc00a/2a380d31/32e20640/f1b0e9/720286733/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNHBhcHBhcyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTgwODI1X01XSDRQYXBwYXNfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4pappas?refcode=e20180825_MWH4Pappas_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Ashlei Blue
subject: Ready to knock some doors?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi there! Wanted to give you a quick update from Team Kathy's field team. Our grassroots volunteers are hard at work here on the ground in North Carolina's 13th District. Every day, we're knocking doors, making phone calls, and registering people to vote. We're reaching out to thousands of voters across North Carolina to talk to them about what's at stake in this upcoming election. Starting today, we're hosting our next big organizing push! [**This weekend, we are hosting our Weekend of Action! Sign up to join us today.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279e2/e3b7d3/5da6e2df/255529dc/249223762/VEsH/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180824") We're in a tough fight. This is one of the most competitive races in the country. Washington special interest groups have already started pouring money into this race to stop Kathy from being elected. But here's what I know: No matter what Rep. Ted Budd's corporate special interest allies throw at us -- we've got something stronger: _you_. This race will be won or lost on the ground. We're growing our grassroots momentum every day. Let's keep it up. [**Sign up to join our grassroots volunteer team today.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279e2/e3b7d3/5da6e2df/255529dc/249223762/VEsE/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180824") Let's go win this thing. Ashlei Blue

The majority of our farmers have struggled to make a profit for the last few years, and that’s even before Trump’s tariffs made things even worse. It’s not just the farmers, though. **Steve King exemplifies what’s wrong with politics.** He’s had 16 years to do something, but he’d rather point fingers and blame others than actually get something done. America doesn’t need more hot air, we need doers. **In J.D. Scholten, we have a candidate with the leadership, the work ethic, and the passion to actually get things done.** Political experts in DC have taken notice! In the past two weeks, our race has been moved out of the “Safe Republican” zone by two ratings agencies. And this video, with campaign expert Nathan Gonzalez of Inside Elections, featured our race!

Team Scholten

I've got bad news, friends. **We just launched our very first TV ad - but we need to raise another $3,700 before midnight to keep it on the air, and right now, we're falling way short.**
If we want to win in New Hampshire and defeat the Trump-Sununu agenda that's taking our state backward, we can't afford to fall short.
Here's the thing: I'm not taking any money from corporate special interests - but I still have to fight against the big money they're spending to defeat me.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Seeing through the smoke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We must stop Zinke from using these fires as an excuse to sell off our public lands.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7806e/2f5ea88d/7663e439/2cbc5ddd/3238044226/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&utm_campaign=zinke-petition&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I wrote to you this week about the massive wildfires ransacking our state and the West Coast. The air still hasn't cleared from all this smoke, and our brave firefighters are out there putting their lives on the line. At a time like this, you'd think we'd see leadership on a national level to call out the main culprit of these wildfires: climate change. But Secretary Zinke says that they have nothing to do with climate change. He blames them on "environmental terrorist organizations." He and his band of climate deniers are stubborn in their disregard for scientific fact. But there's something more than obstinance motivating Zinke's denial: profit. **Secretary Zinke and the Trump administration are using these fires as an excuse to clear cut our forests on public lands.** [**I think that's just plain wrong, and I hope you agree. We need real solutions to climate change -- not profit-driven logging. Sign our petition now to fight back!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7806e/2f5ea88d/7663e439/2cbc5ddd/3238044226/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&utm_campaign=zinke-petition&utm_medium=ema") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7806e/2f5ea88d/7663e439/2cbc5ddd/3238044226/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&utm_campaign=zinke-petition&utm_medium=ema")
---
Cutting down thousands of trees to slow wildfires is a subject of debate among forestry scientists. _But even those who support forest thinning_ have called out Zinke for taking advantage of a climate-fueled disaster to profit his friends in the timber industry.
This is not an empty claim, friend. Zinke has a history of trying to garner public support for massive forest-clearing projects on public lands. His hometown in Montana was built on logging, and when he was a member of Congress, Zinke was notorious for using his position to prop up the timber industry. Now that he's sitting on 65 million acres of forests as Interior Secretary, he's pushing the same exact policies. **Zinke is using these wildfires as an opportunistic attempt to line the pockets of his friends by letting them**clear cut forests on our public lands**.**
We must to do everything we can to prevent wildfires from destroying our property and our forests. Forestry scientists agree that some degree of timber management may be reasonable, but Zinke is going way too far in catering to the timber industry. He's planning to make big money off of terrible disaster.
It's not the first time Zinke has tried to sell off our public lands. Just last week, the Trump administration released plans to sell off 1,610 acres of public lands from the downsized Grand Staircase and Bears Ears National Monuments. We've got to stop this guy.
**I firmly believe that our national lands are a national treasure, and we must do everything we can to protect them -- not sell them off to the highest bidder. That's why we need to fight climate change with smart policy, not by giving the timber industry the green light to cut down our forests.**
[**Sign our petition now to tell Zinke to back off from selling our national lands!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7806e/2f5ea88d/7663e439/2cbc5ddd/3238044226/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&utm_campaign=zinke-petition&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7806e/2f5ea88d/7663e439/2cbc5ddd/3238044226/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/zinke-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&source=ema_2018-08-25_zinke-petition_resend&utm_campaign=zinke-petition&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: [Deadline] 4,156 donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
This is a tough goal, no doubt.
#

Peter -
Our last official, campaign finance deadline before the primary is coming up quickly. Shortly after, we will publicly report our fundraising numbers one more time.
That's why we've set our most ambitious goal to date: **We want to hit 4,156 contributions before our deadline on August 31.**
That's not some random number. No, in fact, that's how many contributions _all of my opponents had received collectively_ as of the last deadline. And we want to reach it in just six days.
We need to reach a lot of voters before the primary, and we know exactly what it's going to take. Hitting this goal is a critical step in making sure we stay on track to raise what we need, and if we raise what we need, we're going to win.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to help get us off to a strong start? This goal is not just about how much we raise but how many people step up to power our campaign. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78093a/6e822e2f/1ac02614/417250cc/1285249979/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180825-full")**
I'll be honest: This is a tough goal, no doubt. But tackling big challenges is what this campaign is all about -- and what my time as Attorney General will be about.
The key to our victories in both instances will be you. And if you're in this with us, there's no limit to what we can accomplish.
All my best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78093a/6e822e2f/1ac02614/417250cc/1285249979/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180825-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78093a/6e822e2f/1ac02614/417250ce/1285249979/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Bob Casey
subject: we knew this was coming...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6303/51dbcc2a/1e0fba72/3a9ce7c/632749372/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

My opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, began running ads for the general election this week. More Pennsylvania voters than ever are seeing his message, and we have to take that seriously.

While he's been running ads and campaigning with the President this month, I've been busy. Fighting to make sure you have quality, affordable health care and fighting to put people above corporations. Congressman Barletta's record makes it clear that he won't put Pennsylvanians first, and he won't stand up to special interest groups.

I'm going to keep fighting, but I need your help. It's never been more important to keep our ads on the air, but that's expensive, and quite frankly we just can't afford to keep up.

**Our budget is tight, and I need your help to make sure that every Pennsylvanian knows that I'm fighting for them with two fists up. Could you donate whatever you can right now to make sure voters across the state hear my message?**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180825_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180825_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

"" Thanks, Bob | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

Hey there,

Outside special interest groups have been hammering Steve on the airwaves as the Kochs flood money into the state to prop up Adam Laxalt. And now we're going to answer back, big time.

Today we're launching our first TV ad of the general election. And with your help, we can expand our buy and make sure more Nevadans hear the truth about Steve.

**[Can you chip in $5 or more and we'll put it directly into buying more TV spots?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rT4AmAOBHhjXM3usqIpDArwLBO19kPzqBmQF62yg2dk=/Nl-o-zPX2chs2_dwZLe8byx8qKYMlKQxcPr8Sr1_S4g=?gpsid=37_57_3138&refcode=em18_180824_EOM2tv_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180824_EOM2tv_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

* GOP mega-donors Sheldon Adelson and the Koch Brothers just poured in over $25 MILLION to Mitch McConnell's war chest -- and he'll spend a lot of that to win in Arizona.

* One expert called these recent right-wing donations "some of the biggest checks in U.S. political history."

* Republican Martha McSally just launched a nasty attack against Kyrsten -- and Republicans are planning on spending over $6 MILLION more attacking her starting next week.

name: Team Sherrod
subject: This isn't where we'd thought we'd be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | "Falling behind" isn't a good place to be with just over ten weeks left to Election Day. But that's where we are: **Falling behind our August goal with only days left.** [**Peter, if we can reach the goal of getting 226 people to match our $26 average online contribution by tomorrow night (the 26th), we can make up lost ground. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: My story (video)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
As I travel across the state and outline my vision to build a stronger Georgia for everyone, I also share stories about my parents. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b4/34a064cc/d49d34b/70ee14a/2133183247/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - As I travel across the state and outline my vision to build a stronger Georgia for everyone, I also share stories about my parents. Stories about my mother, who was the first person in her family to finish high school. Who taught my five siblings and me that although we didn't have much, there was always someone with less - and it was our job to serve them. About my father, the first man in his family to both attend and finish college. Who worked down on the Gulfport shipyards when I was a child, and often faced discrimination because his dyslexia and skin color made many doubt his ability to succeed. I share their stories because they are a part of who I am. I am proud to be the daughter of Robert and Carolyn Abrams, because their values - of faith, family, service, and responsibility - inform the policies I fight for. Their tenacity, their inability to accept the status quo, courses through my veins. My parents are why I believe in a better future for Georgia, and why I will work tirelessly to achieve it. Their stories, combined with my own struggles, are why I am the best candidate to serve as Georgia's next governor. **Watch my story now, then share our new video with a friend.** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b4/34a064cc/d49d34b/70ee14b/2133183247/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6O8fMzlHMK8&feature=youtu.be") My story is not powerful because it is unique. It's not a "rags to riches" tale that shows how I have "cracked the code" or am privy to the secret knowledge of success. No, my story is powerful because it is so commonplace. It is powerful because it is all of our stories, a story about challenges. Because although my parents worked hard and played by the rules - although they sacrificed so much to give their children a better life - forces beyond their control and people in power so removed from our realities hindered our ability to achieve everything we set out to. We were limited by our circumstances, unseen by those who were elected to represent us. This is a story so many Georgians know all too well. That is why I am fighting every day to write a NEW chapter for our state - where our leaders reflect our values and understand our struggles. Where no one is unseen, no one is unheard, and everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. Together, we can not only change the face of leadership - we can make sure our leaders fight for us and know where we're coming from. **To see where I am coming from, watch our new video. And to decide where we will go together, chip in to support our people-powered campaign:** **[https://abrams.bsd.net/Foundations](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b4/34a064cc/d49d34b/70ee148/2133183247/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082518-full")** Let's get it done. \- Stacey
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b4/34a064cc/d49d34b/70ee148/2133183247/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082518-full")**

|

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: The grassroots will pick our next president
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Big news: the DNC finally heard us.
#
Friends,
Big news: the DNC finally heard us.
**As of moments ago, superdelegates will no longer impact first ballot presidential nominations.** In recent decades only the first ballot has determined the nomination and that is often what the press reports--even before the primaries and caucuses begin.
The sweeping reforms made at this week's DNC meeting in Chicago also include incentives for same-day registration and party change. That means the millions of people who are prevented every year from participating in Democratic primaries and caucuses will now have their voices heard. It wouldn't have happened without you.
These changes were pushed through from the grassroots, by grassroots supporters, to better serve all people in our democracy. They will end the tactics of voter suppression in states like New York--governed by Democrats--that set their party registration deadlines six months in advance of their primaries. **Millions more people will be permitted to vote in Democratic caucuses and primaries thanks to your help in pushing through these reforms.**
**[Nothing stands in our way from continuing to make change in the party and our politics when we organize people. That's why your $5 contributions are so important, to help us organize local groups across the country that are changing politics at the local, state, and federal level.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a947/bed43eb/7ab2e39f/75fc9f8e/1292435270/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em180825")**
To compete in all 50 states, we are working inside and outside of the Democratic Party to open it up to working people, young people, and people with no previous party affiliation. With more than 600 local groups already organizing across our country, our work to transform the party gives us an opportunity to elect more progressive candidates to government and party positions.
**[We are changing the status quo to make the Democratic Party work for all of us. Pitch in $5 so that we can build on the DNC reforms and elect more working class candidates in November.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a947/bed43eb/7ab2e39f/75fc9f8e/1292435270/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-dnc?refcode=em180825")**
Today is a victory for the political revolution and the people of this country. Thank you for making it possible.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

clean_body: Big news: the DNC finally heard us. Friends, Big news: the DNC finally heard us. As of moments ago, superdelegates will no longer impact first ballot presidential nominations. In recent decades only the first ballot has determined the nomination and that is often what the press reports--even before the primaries and caucuses begin. The sweeping reforms made at this week's DNC meeting in Chicago also include incentives for same-day registration and party change. That means the millions of people who are prevented every year from participating in Democratic primaries and caucuses will now have their voices heard. It wouldn't have happened without you. These changes were pushed through from the grassroots, by grassroots supporters, to better serve all people in our democracy. They will end the tactics of voter suppression in states like New York--governed by Democrats--that set their party registration deadlines six months in advance of their primaries. Millions more people will be permitted to vote in Democratic caucuses and primaries thanks to your help in pushing through these reforms. "" To compete in all 50 states, we are working inside and outside of the Democratic Party to open it up to working people, young people, and people with no previous party affiliation. With more than 600 local groups already organizing across our country, our work to transform the party gives us an opportunity to elect more progressive candidates to government and party positions. "" Today is a victory for the political revolution and the people of this country. Thank you for making it possible. In solidarity, Larry Cohen Board Chair Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. **NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**SATURDAY, AUGUST 25th**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
With the primary election just over two weeks away, Republicans are energized and looking forward to choosing our candidates for the general election. We certainly have a great group to choose from!
In a recent UNH poll, it showed that 70% of New Hampshire Democrats are planning to vote this November, while 68% of New Hampshire Republicans say the same.
We need to make sure we get our committed Republicans out to the polls and convince the undeclared voters to vote red!
While Molly Kelly, Steve Marchand, Maura Sullivan, Chris Pappas and Levi Sanders move their party further and further left, Republicans under Governor Chris Sununu and our Republican legislature have delivered real results for the Granite State. For the sake of our fellow citizens, we cannot fail in November!
We have the record to run on and achieve winning campaigns up and down the ballot this fall - we just need to get Republicans organized and out in the field in order to secure victory!
On another note, [the Roast of Governor John H. Sununu is this Thursday night and I hope you are able to join us!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyEfq5J3C9sVYYsQHsL9XYSA-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MwtyGbYQiF3YA05BQwu-2FJHz64kyCVkD0ctBT-2F083qAEfUHOot-2F7kNDRhudggYExfEJpJloXCMWz96n0sheg7Ycnl2bLoy24l8vFsbkmFX9ynynLH2XN7Wppfj9fQnxdx3wWWkfhqV2tXeB7CNoA3qL7TjrSDXPRZT7vpY1daSJ7Mre-2Bp5rPSjGF-2BjAkAThTXOhogV-2FfQZNEV9g-2Bq3r2SRa4kGyFrIHzZrxSoYmMs1AkWFGEvAny98vdiVrcilohunZ-2Bt8pm1AnSp6DkVl-2B-2BYNUg-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER SATURDAY, AUGUST 25th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, With the primary election just over two weeks away, Republicans are energized and looking forward to choosing our candidates for the general election. We certainly have a great group to choose from! In a recent UNH poll, it showed that 70% of New Hampshire Democrats are planning to vote this November, while 68% of New Hampshire Republicans say the same. We need to make sure we get our committed Republicans out to the polls and convince the undeclared voters to vote red! While Molly Kelly, Steve Marchand, Maura Sullivan, Chris Pappas and Levi Sanders move their party further and further left, Republicans under Governor Chris Sununu and our Republican legislature have delivered real results for the Granite State. For the sake of our fellow citizens, we cannot fail in November! We have the record to run on and achieve winning campaigns up and down the ballot this fall - we just need to get Republicans organized and out in the field in order to secure victory! On another note, Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT GOP VETS CONFERENCE CALL UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK It's clear - Governor Chris Sununu is leading New Hampshire in the right direction! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on the Auburn-Chester-Sandown GOP! They held a great event this past weekend and are committed to securing victory this November!
